name: Valera Global-Inc
principals: Rodney Barfield (President); Dolores Barfield (VP/Part Owner); Raymond Battelli; Naomi Glaser (SVP Marketing & Sales)
districts_or_customers: NYC-area corporate executives; airport transfers; serves NY metro plus 'major U.S. cities and European destinations' via affiliate network

name: Greene Classic Limousine

districts_or_customers: Atlanta-metro corporate, event, wedding/prom and group-charter clients; global affiliate network across 450 cities

fit_notes: NOT a fit for Summit. Luxury limo / motorcoach / charter operator — not a K-12 school-bus contractor. No evidence of district contracts, Type A/C/D yellow-bus fleet, or SPED routing.

name: Welltrans Inc
principals: Haskell D. Portee (Owner/President/CEO); William Retherford (COO); Dave Trepanier (Director of Integrations); Tim Terhune (Director of Finance); Ray Hagan (VP of Operations)
districts_or_customers: Medicaid managed-care organizations and health plans in IN and surrounding states; uses independent transportation providers (broker model, not asset-owning operator)
recent_news: Ray Hagan featured on NEMT Experts Podcast #58 discussing rural NEMT solutions; no M&A activity reported; appears to remain founder-led
fit_notes: NOT a fit for Summit. WellTrans is a NEMT broker/coordinator (uses independent transportation providers) focused on Medicaid healthcare trips, not a school-bus contractor. No school-district business; asset-light model misaligned with Summit's yellow-bus tuck-in thesis.

name: Navigator Express Inc
service_types: likely small private transport / paratransit (per source SIC: special-needs)
districts_or_customers: None identified publicly; PO Box-only address (PO Box 563, Stone Mountain GA) and minimal LinkedIn footprint (~7 followers) suggest micro-operator
recent_news: No news found; web domain navigatorexp.com is a Chicago-area trucking/logistics firm and is NOT this Georgia entity (different business)
website: unknown (listed navigatorexp.com is unrelated IL trucking co.)
fit_notes: Likely NOT a fit. Micro 4-employee PO-Box operation in Stone Mountain GA with no verifiable website, no district contracts, and minimal digital footprint. Even if operating in SPED/student transport, fleet would be too small to be a meaningful tuck-in; would only warrant outreach if confirmed to hold DeKalb/Gwinnett SPED contracts (not evidenced).

name: K & M Hubbard Enterprise LLC
principals: Katherine Hubbard (Co-Owner); M. Hubbard (co-owner, SDVOSB veteran principal)
districts_or_customers: Medicaid/NEMT riders across Suffolk and Nassau Counties, with primary focus on the North Fork of Long Island; some NYC trips; eMedNY/Medicaid transportation provider
recent_news: Profiled in Suffolk Times 'Work We Do' column (Dec 2019) — Katherine Hubbard described focus on North Fork wheelchair-accessible medical transport; SDVOSB designation; no acquisition or growth news since
fit_notes: NOT a fit for Summit. d/b/a 'K&M Reliable Transportation' is a Medicaid NEMT / wheelchair transport business serving Long Island medical riders — not a K-12 school-bus contractor. No yellow-bus fleet, no district contracts, no SPED routing. Special-needs SIC tag in source data refers to NEMT, not student SPED.
